problem_solved: Complex, fragmented clinical trial operations with manual data capture and slow trial execution
solution_description: Unified clinical trial platform including Rave EDC, CTMS, patient recruitment, and analytics. Acquired by Dassault Systemes. Powers ~50% of all clinical trials globally.
notes: Clinical trial infrastructure leader. Rave is the gold standard for electronic data capture. Competes with Veeva Vault CTMS, Oracle Clinical One.
